programme.title: Love It or List It
programme.desc: Hilary and David work to find more functional space for a family of five.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Love It or List It
programme.desc: A family of four has outgrown their home of ten years; David searches for a turnkey house, while Hilary designs outside the box to solve all their space challenges.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Love It or List It
programme.desc: A newly married couple purchase the house she grew up in, but there's plenty wrong with it; now with a baby on the way, she hopes Hilary can work her magic on the place, but he thinks David can find a new home better suited for their growing family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Erin's high school friend is ready to leave her childhood home for a new chapter with her family; they ask Ben and Erin to turn a dated, well-preserved house into a southern-inspired forever home, but surprises lurk beneath the surface.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Ben's little brother and his wife secretly buy a fixer-upper and plan to renovate it themselves to save money; as they move and race to finish before their third baby arrives, Ben and Erin try to convince them to accept some help.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: An engaged couple wants to update her midcentury home for their blended family as they start their next chapter; but an unexpected request and mounting complications ramp up the pressure, and Ben and Erin must race to finish before the wedding.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Tiny Spaces, Big Dreams: Tokyo and Paris
programme.desc: A Washingtonian heads to Tokyo for a new lease on life, while a Bostonian pursues a lifelong dream of moving to Paris. To make it work, both may have to adjust to life in tiny spaces.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Follow Your Muse to Puerto Morelos, Mexico
programme.desc: A less-traveled boyfriend is inspired by his more worldly partner to move from Denver to Puerto Morelos, Mexico. They want outdoor space for their pets, and she doesn't mind paying to be near the beach, but he prefers to spend less.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A Canadian teacher is ready to break out of small-town life and relocate to Bangkok; after visiting Thailand early in her career, she's now taking a year-long teaching stint and her husband's along for his first big-city, Asian experience.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: On the Spanish coast just south of Barcelona, best friends from Texas look for an affordable dream home near Tarragona; with a local property expert, they tour through all the local culture and traditions the flavorful region has to offer.

programme.title: World's Bargain Dream Homes
programme.desc: On the Greek island of Crete, a Tennessee woman travels 6000 miles in search of her forever home; with her bestie along, they discover the magic of local life, bargain homes, and the cheap cost of living.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: No Snow in Port Macquarie, Australia
programme.desc: A retired military officer from Alaska dreams of living by the sand and surf in Port Macquarie, Australia; moving isn't a problem since his wife is Australian, but the pressure's on to make the transition from Virginia smooth for their kids.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: After a decade abroad in the US and Belgium, a Norwegian man returns home with his American fiancé to Oslo. He wants to be close to nature in a place that's outside the city, but his fiancé prefers something modern that's downtown.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Family Life and Riviera Dreams in Nice
programme.desc: High school sweethearts from Tennessee, now raising three kids, trade their fast-paced life for the seaside charm of Nice, France. With a tight budget and a need for space, they're seeking a home that blends beachiness with everyday practicality.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: An incoming master's student from Portland, Oregon, calls on her mom to help find a flat in Oxford, England; she's pushing for independence and wants a place of her own near the university, but Mom thinks having roommates would ease some of the pressure.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A young couple's search for their first home becomes a tug-of-war in the Chicago suburbs. She has a deep-rooted need to stay close to family, but he's pushing for independence by investing in a bigger house farther out.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: Leaving the Gritty for the Queen City
programme.desc: After years of New Jersey cold weather and traffic, a couple looks for a warm and slow pace in Charlotte, N.C.; she wants a large home for entertaining family and he wants room for his podcast, their style differences may be a challenge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A Michigan couple has been living in his house from a previous marriage; after 15 years, she's ready for a new place; she wants a fresh start in a home; he prefers a modern Colonial and thinks they should consider downsizing.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: A Salon to Dye for in Florida
programme.desc: A couple searches for a property by the beach in Ft. Lauderdale, Fla.; they're looking for a home with plenty of space to run their hair salon; but one wants something whimsical with character, while the other prefers midcentury modern.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: Leaving City Life in New York
programme.desc: Buyers are on the hunt for a home in New York's beautiful Hudson Valley. They want an eye-catching place to share with guests visiting from New York City, but only one is willing to spend, so they'll need to compromise on either size or condition.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple on a path to retirement leaves Austin, Texas, for a lower cost of living and a place that's closer to family in Missouri. They know exactly what they want, and they aren't afraid to fire their agent if she can't deliver.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: British Expat Looks for Fresh Start in Virginia
programme.desc: After a divorce, a British transplant looks for a fresh start in Fredericksburg, Virginia; she wants a bungalow-style home with space to entertain, but her eyes may be bigger than her budget.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Three church friends look to buy a home together in Tacoma, Washington. They're leaning on their faith to find the right home, but with three different sets of opinions and priorities, getting everyone to agree may be a challenge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Zillow Gone Wild
programme.desc: Jack heads out to Palm Springs, California, where he tours the former home of Hollywood royalty; Jack discovers a unique solution for storage in Gold Rush territory and learns the meaning of natural building in Lake Tahoe.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Zillow Gone Wild
programme.desc: Jack makes three more stops on his search for the wildest homes, including a newly-bought home that takes its cues from a musical instrument, an earth-dome compound in the desert, and a home fit for a king.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Zillow Gone Wild
programme.desc: Jack's wild home odyssey starts in St. Louis where a Catholic church has undergone a conversion; next, it's the California desert where a color burst has recently been sold; then he arrives at a slice of history that's been repurposed into a home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Zillow Gone Wild
programme.desc: Jack embarks on a journey to Nevada, where an unassuming home hides a pirate's treasure; he tours the unique architecture of a house built on a bridge; his final stop is New Orleans, where a historic home is bathed in the history of the city.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Zillow Gone Wild
programme.desc: Jack enrolls for a schoolhouse turned family home experience; he tours two homes: a mountaintop in Calif., that literally brings the outside in, and a farmhouse in Miss., that holds tiled and mosaic features.

programme.title: Zillow Gone Wild
programme.desc: Jack's first stop on his wild home journey is a listing in Santa Barbara, California, that's inspired by marine biology; next, he visits a metal-and-glass marvel in Omaha, Nebraska; he finds a comic book-inspired lair in Las Vegas.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.sub-title: Second Chances All Around, in Bangor
programme.desc: After a second chance drawing, a couple wins a whopping $250,000 on an original losing ticket; now, David is challenged to find a spacious home fit for their growing family in Bangor, Maine.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A man finally scores a $1 million jackpot win on a scratcher after playing the lotto regularly for more than 20 years; winter sports are his favorite hobbies; David is tasked to help find a mountain getaway on Moosehead Lake in Greenville, Maine.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: When a Pennsylvanian woman receives an inheritance, it gives her the opportunity to move to the warm shores of Myrtle Beach, S.C.; David helps her and her bestie navigate beach real estate to find her forever home.

programme.desc: A couple caring for elderly parents couldn't afford a home for themselves until he won $1 million on a scratcher; David searches for a well-appointed condo with a huge kitchen so she can cook her Italian bolognese.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: After a $1.6 million Powerball win, a couple's ready to buy a home in their favorite vacation spot in Palm Springs, Calif.; they're ready to splurge and they're calling on David to find a place their families can gather to carry on traditions.

programme.desc: After an unexpected windfall from selling the family farm, a New York couple now has the funds to relocate to Port St. Lucie, Fla.; she wants a place to host new friends while he wants remote and quiet.

programme.desc: When a Miami, Fla., native received an inheritance, she knew it was time to find a vacation condo in South Beach; it's where she and her best friend grew up and made great memories, so now she needs David's help to find a place.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.sub-title: Casa Rica, the Essence of Dreams
programme.desc: Former housekeepers have built a cleaning empire, and now they're ready to find a $5 million luxury vacation home in Costa Rica. With one of the biggest budgets ever, David Bromstad shows some epic homes with stunning water views!

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.sub-title: Haunted Homes, Bestie Adventures, and True Love
programme.desc: David revisits unforgettable winners to see how their lottery dream homes and lives have transformed. There's spooky Salem dreamers with a friendly ghost, North Carolina besties, and a pair of Florida lovebirds.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Married nurses need a bigger place for themselves and their five pets in New Jersey. They're wary of buying again after losing thousands on a previous home that fell through, but staying in their cramped row home is no longer an option.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: An entrepreneur wants to move closer to the gym he owns to cut down on commute time in downtown Atlanta; he wants a place on the south side that's modern and ready to party, but his girlfriend wants him to consider the north side where she lives.

programme.title: Relief from Inflammation
programme.desc: Connie Craig-Carrol & Founder Ken Meares investigates Omega XL, the ultimate all-natural solution for joint pain from inflammation.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Renovation Aloha
programme.sub-title: There's a Tree Growing Through the Roof!
programme.desc: Kamohai and Tristyn track down the owners of a home that's been abandoned for 20 years and purchase it; the house is in a great location but in rough shape with a tree growing through the roof.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Renovation Aloha
programme.desc: Kamohai and Tristyn expand their business to the Big Island with a reno in Kailua-Kona that's large and needs a deep clean; tensions rise when they hire a contractor that doesn't show up to work, forcing them to scramble to keep the project moving.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Renovation Aloha
programme.desc: When an off-island investor begs the Kalamas to rescue her rental disaster, they inherit unpaid rent, a hostile squatter and a house they've never seen; after a tense cash-for-keys deal, HOA battles and material delays threaten to wipe out profit.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Renovation Aloha
programme.desc: When the Kalamas take on a roach-infested Manoa fixer, they think they've scored big, until demo reveals plumbing disasters, termite damage and a budget-busting surprise; to save the flip, they bet on a secondary suite and a smart backyard reset.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Renovation Aloha
programme.desc: With home prices soaring, the Kalamas head to Hawaii's Big Island to prove affordable island living still exists. But when Kamohai buys land near an active lava zone, they're forced into a high-risk build where paradise may come at a dangerous price.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: After winning big on a scratch-off, a couple hunt for their dream home near Canton, Ohio; David braves the cold to help them find the perfect compromise between city and country living in a snow-covered winter wonderland adventure.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: David meets his newest winners in the semi-rural countryside of the border between New York and Canada; despite the winter chill, they're looking forward to the summers as they search for a home with country charm and a pool.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Thanks to a million-dollar win on a scratch-off, a couple and their baby can finally move out of their one-bedroom apartment; David is happy to help this family find a bigger home near Binghamton, N.Y., even if he does struggle with the city's name.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: When a Long Island couple relocates to North Carolina, life takes an unexpected turn; after facing a series of setbacks, a turning point comes with an inheritance from her late mother, a timely windfall that offers them the chance to start over.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: After receiving a family inheritance, ex-Long Island residents now see an opportunity to buy a property in their much-loved Vermont; David steps in and finds character-filled homes full of variety and charm in the breathtaking mountain landscape.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A couple with a $2 million budget is ready to find their dream home, but she's a city mouse, and her husband prefers the country; unable to reach a decision, they ask David to help find a house with a lot of space for him and bling for her.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: With the help of an inheritance, a couple and their daughter search for a house upgrade to fit their extended family; David's tasked with finding a place big enough for a teenager, an adult son, and some pets in Santa Fe, New Mexico.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
